testsuite.name: Scenario: enough cukes and enough waiting just past the boundary

testcase.name: Given I have eaten 11 cukes
testcase.classname: Scenario: enough cukes and enough waiting just past the boundary

testcase.name: When I wait 2 hour
testcase.classname: Scenario: enough cukes and enough waiting just past the boundary

testcase.name: Then my belly should growl
testcase.classname: Scenario: enough cukes and enough waiting just past the boundary

testcase.name: classMethod
testcase.classname: Scenario: enough cukes and enough waiting just past the boundary

testsuite.system-out: I'm eating 11 cukes! I ate 11 cucumbers.
